description: I want to add a basic support module. Create a Contact Us form that saves user inquiries into a SupportTickets table in the database. On the Admin Dashboard, add a 'Search Bookings' feature where I can find a user by their Email or Phone Number. Add a 'Manual Redeem' button for Admins. This allows us to help customers whose QR codes aren't scanning by manually updating their status to 'Redeemed' after verifying their ID.
